commands.review_summary:
The PR adds native Apple Messages poll decoding for history/watch, CLI/RPC poll send surfaces, private IMCore poll payload construction, fixture/command/RPC tests, and docs.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new feature PR rather than a bug report. Source inspection and contributor proof show the intended decode/send paths, but there is no failing current-main behavior to reproduce.
